It’s time to take your design game to the next level 🚀.

summary: Stillness & Screens: A Meditative UX Jam
location: Art of Living International Centre\, 21st KM\, Udayapura Post\, Kanakapura Main Rd\, Bengaluru\, Karnataka 560082\, India
description:
Get up-to-date information at: https://lu.ma/z6bn24h0?pk=g-RFMW8s2l4Q2w7j9

Address:
Art of Living International Centre
Reach at Gate 5 Art of Living International Center
Bengaluru\, Karnataka
India

Let’s pause — not just to breathe\, but to think better.

This offline session is crafted for UX designers\, creative thinkers\, and curious minds who want to design with more clarity\, empathy\, and purpose. We’ll begin with a grounding meditation to connect with stillness — the space where deep ideas and real empathy are born.

Then we’ll open up the floor to:
Discuss design thinking: how to frame the right problems\, not just chase quick solutions
Network and share perspectives with fellow designers and thinkers
Pick one real-world problem statement and take it with us as a shared challenge to…

Hosted by Nidhi
